scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @boomin/connect && npm run build --workspace @boomin/server && npm run build --workspace @boomin/cli && npm run build --workspace @boomin/mcp && npm run build --workspace boominjs
scripts.pack:dry: npm pack --dry-run --workspace @boomin/connect && npm pack --dry-run --workspace @boomin/server && npm pack --dry-run --workspace @boomin/cli && npm pack --dry-run --workspace @boomin/mcp
